visual_description: A group of men in suits and casual attire stand in a dimly lit, narrow interior space with fluorescent lighting, some facing forward while others are turned sideways or seated at a table. One man in a light-colored suit stands with his back to the camera, facing the group, while another seated man at a table appears to be interacting with items on it. The scene features tiled walls, framed pictures, and a visible doorway leading to a darker area with foliage outside.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable sigh at the beginning.
